# Vendored third-party assets

## xlsx.full.min.js

- **Library**: [SheetJS Community Edition](https://github.com/SheetJS/sheetjs) (`xlsx` npm package)
- **Version**: 0.18.5
- **License**: Apache License 2.0 (see upstream repo)
- **Why vendored**: FR-07's self-service upload/export runs entirely client-side
  (this is a static site with no backend). Excel read/write needs a real library -
  loaded from a local file here rather than a CDN so the dashboard keeps working
  offline and isn't dependent on a third-party host staying up.
- **Not regenerated by generate_dashboard.py** - this file is a one-time vendor
  copy. To update: `npm install xlsx@<version>` somewhere and copy
  `node_modules/xlsx/dist/xlsx.full.min.js` here again.
